scope: wave2 fan-out migration: the 5 legacy-parity read streams only (contacts, contact_groups, users, teams, shared_labels). Missive's write endpoints (message send, conversation/comment creation) are out of scope for this migration (legacy itself ships no writes; capabilities.write is false).

excluded.reason: legacy connector never implemented message send; not implemented in this bundle
post/comment creation not modeled by legacy; not implemented in this bundle
conversation listing not modeled by legacy; not implemented in this bundle
webhook management not modeled by legacy; not implemented in this bundle
